data.name: AvailableNetworks_Md1
data.value: Available networks:

data.name: ChannelKeyShort_Md1
data.value: key

data.name: Channel_Md2
data.value: Channel

data.name: ChatStatus_ActiveChatSession_Md2
data.value: Active chat session:

data.name: ChatStatus_ApprovedCanStillStartChat_Md2
data.value: Approved or registered devices and channels still can start new chat sessions\.

data.name: ChatStatus_ApprovedChannels_Md2
data.value: Channels approved for chat sessions

data.name: ChatStatus_ApprovedDevices_Md2
data.value: Devices approved for chat sessions

data.name: ChatStatus_ChatActive_Md2
data.value: This chat is *active* in TMesh and can get new chat requests from Meshtastic devices and channels\.

data.name: ChatStatus_ChatCommand_Md2
data.value: Meshtastic command: `{0} {1}` via DM to {2} or private channel registered with TMesh\.
data.comment: {0} - chat command, {1} - registered tg chat name, {2} - tbot node name

data.name: ChatStatus_ChatDisabled_Md2
data.value: This chat is registered in TMesh with name {0} but currently *disabled* for new chat requests\.

data.name: ChatStatus_ChatNotRegistered_Md2
data.value: This chat is not registered in TMesh and cannot receive chat requests from Meshtastic devices or channels\.

data.name: ChatStatus_FilteredChannelsAndDevices_Md2
data.value: Filtered channels and devices:

data.name: ChatStatus_NoDevicesMatchFilter_Md2
data.value: No registered or approved devices or channels matching filter '{0}'\.

data.name: ChatStatus_NoRegisteredDevicesOrChannels_Md2
data.value: No registered devices or channels\. You can register a new device with the {0} command, channel with {1} command, or start a temporary chat with `{2} \!\<deviceId\>`\. Please remove the bot from the group if you don't need it\.
data.comment: {0} - add device command, {1} - add channel command, {2} - chat command

data.name: ChatStatus_RegisteredChannelsAndDevices_Md2
data.value: Registered channels and devices:

data.name: ChatStatus_RegisteredChannels_Md2
data.value: Registered channels:

data.name: ChatStatus_RegisteredDevices_Md2
data.value: Registered devices:

data.name: ChatStatus_StartToRegister_Md2
data.value: To register this chat in TMesh run command: `{0}`

data.name: ChatStatus_ToReenableUseStart_Md2
data.value: To allow incoming chat request from new Meshtastic devices run command: `{0}`

data.name: CityNotListed_Md1
data.value: If your city is not listed and you are ready to convert your device to a TMesh gateway, please contact the administrator - {0)

data.name: Device
data.value: Device

data.name: DevicesWithoutKnownPosition
data.value: Devices without known position

data.name: Device_Md2
data.value: Device

data.name: Filtered_Md2
data.value: filtered

data.name: FlashFirmwareAt_Md1
data.value: Flash it at

data.name: Gateways_Md1
data.value: Gateways

data.name: Gateway_Md2
data.value: Gateway

data.name: Id_Md1
data.value: ID

data.name: Id_Md2
data.value: ID

data.name: LastPositionUpdate
data.value: last position update

data.name: Network_Md2
data.value: network

data.name: NodeInfo_Md2
data.value: node info

data.name: NoNetworksConfigured
data.value: No networks configured.

data.name: NoPublicChannels_Md1
data.value: No public channels

data.name: NoRegisteredDevices
data.value: No registered devices matching filter '{0}'

data.name: NotAvailableShort_Md2
data.value: N/A

data.name: Position_Md2
data.value: position

data.name: SingleDeviceMode_Md2
data.value: Single Device

data.name: TimestampAgo
data.value: {0} ago

data.name: TimestampAgo_Md2
data.value: {0} ago

data.name: Unknown
data.value: Unknown

data.name: WelcomeMessage_Md1
data.value:
Welcome to the TMesh Telegram bot! This bot allows you to connect your Telegram account with Meshtastic devices and channels, enabling seamless communication between them. Please read carefully the privacy disclaimer:
*{0}*
Please reply with *{1}* to start using the bot or {2} to cancel.
data.comment: {0} - privacy disclaimer message, {1} - yes resource, {2} - stop command

data.name: yes
data.value: yes

data.name: OperationCanceled
data.value: Operation canceled.

data.name: NoActiveOperationToStop
data.value: There is no active operation to stop it.

data.name: Kill_ConfirmPrompt_Md1
data.value:
Please confirm that you want to delete this chat from TMesh. This will delete chat, delete all registered devices and channels, delete approved devices and channels. If you want to disable new chat requests from unknown devices and channels you can use {1} command instead of {0}.
To confirm please reply with `yes` or {2} to cancel the operation.
data.comment: {0} - kill command, {1} - disable command, {2} - stop command

data.name: Kill_RepeatConfirmPrompt_Md1
data.value:
To confirm that you want to remove this chat, please reply with `yes`.
Please try again or type {0} to cancel.

data.name: Kill_Done
data.value: Chat has been removed. All registrations and approvals have been removed and the chat will no longer receive any messages from the bot. To start using the bot again use {0} command.

data.name: Disable_ActiveSessionEnded
data.value: Active chat session was ended

data.name: Disable_Done
data.value:
✅ Your chat has been disabled. You will not receive requests to start new chat from Meshtastic devices. Devices and channels added via {1} and {2} will still be able to send messages.
Use {0} to re-enable it.
data.comment: {0} - start command, {1} - add device command, {2} - add channel

data.name: Disable_AlreadyDisabled
data.value:
This chat is already disabled. You will not receive requests to start new chat from Meshtastic devices. Devices and channels added via {1} and {2} will still be able to send messages.
Use {0} to re-enable it.
data.comment: {0} - start command, {1} - add device command, {2} - add channel

data.name: Start_NeedUsername
data.value: To use chat features you need to set a Telegram username for your account in Telegram settings. Please set a username and then use {0} command again.

data.name: Start_PrivateDone_Md2
data.value:
✅ Your Telegram chat is now registered with TMesh\!
🔹 Meshtastic devices and channels can now initiate a chat with you using: `{4} {0}` via {1} or private channel registered with TMesh\.
🔹 You can also start a chat with any Meshtastic device: `{4} \!\<deviceId\>` Example: `{4} \!75bcd15`
🔹 To end an active chat session: `{5}` \- ends current chat session 🔹 To disable your chat from receiving new chat request from Meshtastic \(already approved devices and channels still will be able to start chat sessions\): `{6}`
You can also use `{2}` and `{3}` commands to register devices and channels for permanent messaging\.
data.comment: {0} - chat name (escaped), {1} - bot node name (escaped), {2} - add device command, {3} - add channel command, {4} - chat command, {5} - end chat command, {6} - disable command

data.name: Start_GroupAlreadyActive_Md1
data.value: This group chat is already registered and active with name *{0}*. Meshtastic devices can reach it using `{3} {1}` command via {2} or private channel registered with TMesh. If you want to change group name, disable it with `{4}` command and start again with new name.
data.comment: {0} - chat name (escaped), {1} - chat name (escaped), {2} - bot node name (escaped), {3} - chat command, {4} - disable command

data.name: Start_GroupNeedName
data.value: This chat is group chat. Please provide a unique name for the chat. Name should have no spaces and contain less than {0} characters. Name can't start with '@'. Meshtastic devices will be able to connect to this chat with {2} <your_chat_name> command via {1} node or private channel registered with TMesh.
data.comment: {0} - max chat name length, {1} - bot node name, {2} - chat command

data.name: RegisterGroup_NeedValidName
data.value: Please provide a valid name for the chat.

data.name: RegisterGroup_NameTaken
data.value: Chat name '{0}' is already taken. Please choose a different name.

data.name: RegisterGroup_Done
data.value: ✅ Chat is registered successfully with name {0}. Devices can now send requests to start chat with this group using {3} {1} command via {2} node or private channel registered with TMesh.
data.comment: {0} - chat name, {1} - chat name, {2} - bot node name, {3} - chat command

data.name: PrivacyConfirm_RepeatPrompt_Md1
data.value:
To confirm that you have read and understood the privacy notice, please reply with `yes`.
Please try again or type {0} to cancel.

data.name: ChannelPrivacyConfirm_RepeatPrompt_Md1
data.value:
To confirm that you understand the privacy risks and want to proceed with registering this channel, please reply with `yes`.
Please try again or type {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddDevice_NeedId
data.value: Please send your Meshtastic device ID. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).

data.name: AddDevice_InvalidIdFormat
data.value:
Invalid device ID format: '{0}'. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).
Examples: • {1} 123456789 • {1} !75bcd15 • {1} #75bcd15
Or use {1} without parameters and I'll ask for the device ID.
data.comment: {0} - provided device ID text, {1} - add device command

data.name: AddDevice_InvalidIdFormatShort
data.value: Invalid device ID. Please send a valid Meshtastic device ID. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #). Send {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddDevice_NotSeenByNode
data.value:
Device {0} has not yet been seen by the {1} node in the Meshtastic network. 1. Check that you are located in supported city (network) with {3} command. 2. Verify that primary channel on your device is configured correctly (see correct channels in {3}). 3. Find node {1} in the node list, open it and click on 'Exchange user information'. {1} broadcasts its node info every {2} minutes.
Registration aborted.
data.comment: {0} - hex device id, {1} - bot node name long, {2} - nodeinfo interval minutes, {3} - list networks command

data.name: AddDevice_AlreadyRegistered
data.value: Device {0} ({1}) is already registered in this chat. Registration aborted.

data.name: AddDevice_TooManyCodesSent
data.value: Device {0} ({1}) has reached the maximum number of verification codes sent. Please wait at least 1 hour before trying again to add the same device to any chats. Registration aborted.

data.name: AddDevice_VerificationCodeSent
data.value: Verification code sent to device {0} ({1}). Please reply with the received code here. The code is valid for 5 minutes.

data.name: VerificationCode_InvalidFormat
data.value: Invalid code format. Please send the 6-digit verification code sent to your Meshtastic device. Send {0} to cancel.

data.name: VerificationCode_InvalidOrExpired
data.value: Invalid or expired code. Please check it and try again, or cancel with {0}.

data.name: VerificationCode_Success
data.value: Registration successful.

data.name: VerificationCode_Text
data.value: TMesh verification code is: {0}

data.name: RemoveDevice_NeedId
data.value: Please send your Meshtastic device ID. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).

data.name: RemoveDevice_NeedIdOrStop
data.value: Please send a Meshtastic device ID to remove or {0} to cancel.

data.name: RemoveDevice_InvalidIdOrStop
data.value: Invalid device ID format. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #). Send {0} to cancel.

data.name: RemoveDevice_InvalidIdFormat
data.value:
Invalid device ID format: '{0}'. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).
Examples: • {1} 123456789 • {1} !75bcd15 • {1} #75bcd15
Or use {1} without parameters and I'll ask for the device ID.
data.comment: {0} - provided device ID text, {1} - remove device command

data.name: RemoveDevice_NotRegistered
data.value: Device {0} is not registered in this chat.

data.name: RemoveDevice_Done
data.value: Device {0} has been removed from this chat.

data.name: RemoveDevice_NotRegisteredInChatForAll
data.value: Device {0} is not registered in this chat. To prove ownership of device please register it first in this chat then retry the command.

data.name: RemoveDevice_DoneFromAll
data.value: Device {0} has been removed from all chats.

data.name: RemoveChannel_NeedIdOrStop
data.value: Please send a Channel ID to remove or {0} to cancel.

data.name: RemoveChannel_InvalidIdOrStop
data.value: Invalid channel ID format. The channel ID must be a valid integer. Send {0} to cancel.

data.name: RemoveChannel_NoChanels
data.value: No channels are registered or approved in this chat.

data.name: RemoveChannel_ListRegistered
data.value: Registered channels:

data.name: RemoveChannel_ListApproved
data.value: Approved channels:

data.name: RemoveChannel_ListAskId
data.value: Please send the ID of the channel you want to remove.

data.name: RemoveChannel_InvalidIdFormat
data.value:
Invalid channel ID format: '{0}'. The channel ID must be a valid integer.
Please use remove command without params to see ids of registered channels Examples: • {1} 123456789 Or use {1} without parameters and I'll ask for the channel ID.
data.comment: {0} - provided channel ID text, {1} - remove channel command

data.name: RemoveChannel_NotRegistered
data.value: Channel {0} is not registered in this chat.

data.name: RemoveChannel_Done
data.value: Channel {0} has been removed from this chat.

data.name: RemoveChannel_NotRegisteredInChatForAll
data.value: Channel {0} is not registered in this chat. To prove that you still have access to the channel please register it first in this chat then retry the command.

data.name: RemoveChannel_DoneFromAllWithOthers
data.value: Channel {0} has been removed from this chat and all other chats where you have registered it. Registration of the channel created by other Telegram users in other chats are not removed.

data.name: AddChannel_NeedNetworkId
data.value: Please reply with the network ID from the list, or {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidNetworkId
data.value: Invalid network ID. Please reply with a valid network ID from the list, or {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddChannel_NetworkSelected
data.value: You have selected network "{0}". Please send your Meshtastic channel name.

data.name: AddChannel_NeedKey
data.value: Please send your Meshtastic channel key (base64-encoded, 16 or 32 bytes).

data.name: AddChannel_NeedName
data.value: Please send your Meshtastic channel name.

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidName
data.value:
Invalid channel name format: '{0}'. The channel name must be a valid Meshtastic channel name (less than 12 bytes).
Please try again or type {1} to cancel the registration.

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidKey
data.value:
Invalid channel key format: '{0}'. The channel key must be a valid Meshtastic channel key (base64-encoded, 16 or 32 bytes).
Please try again or type {1} to cancel the registration.

data.name: AddChannel_DefaultKeyWarning_Md1
data.value: The provided channel key is the default Meshtastic channel key. Anyone will be able to read your messages. This is not secure. Please reply with `my key is not secure` to confirm that you understand the risks and want to proceed with registering this channel, or type {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddChannel_InsecureKeyRepeatConfirm_Md1
data.value:
To confirm that you understand the risks and want to proceed with registering this channel, please reply with `my key is not secure`.
Please try again or type {0} to cancel the registration.

data.name: AddChannel_PublicKeyNotAllowed
data.value: Adding public, well known channels is not allowed. Registration process aborted. Please try with private channels.

data.name: AddChannel_PublicKeyNotAllowedDirect
data.value: Adding public, well-known channels is not allowed.

data.name: AddChannel_CorruptedState
data.value: Registration data is corrupted, channel name or network is missing in chat state. Registration process aborted. Please try again.

data.name: AddChannel_CorruptedStateNetwork
data.value: Registration data is corrupted, network is missing in chat state. Registration process aborted. Please try again.

data.name: AddChannel_AlreadyRegistered
data.value: Channel {0} with same key is already registered in this chat. Registration aborted.

data.name: AddChannel_TooManyCodesSent
data.value: Channel {0} has reached the maximum number of verification codes sent. Please wait at least 1 hour before trying again to add the same channel to any chats. Registration aborted.

data.name: AddChannel_VerificationCodeSent
data.value: Verification code sent to channel {0}. Please reply with the received code here. The code is valid for 5 minutes.

data.name: AddChannel_NeedSingleDevice_Md1
data.value:
Is this channel used by a single device only?
• Reply *single* - Optimized routing will be used (works only for single device channels) • Reply *multiple* - Standard broadcast routing will be used
Type {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidSingleDeviceReply_Md1
data.value: Please reply with *single* or *multiple*, or type {0} to cancel.

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidIdFormat
data.value:
Invalid network ID format: '{0}'. The network ID must be a valid integer.
Examples: • {1} 123 MyChannel ZGeGFyhk<...>3sUOUGyaHqrvU= single • {1} 123 MyChannel ZGeGFyhk<...>3sUOUGyaHqrvU= multiple Or use {1} without parameters and I'll ask for the network, channel name and key.
data.comment: {0} - provided network ID text, {1} - add channel command

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidMode
data.value: Invalid mode '{0}'. Use 'single' or 'multiple' as the third argument.

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidKeyFormat
data.value:
Invalid channel key format: '{0}'. The channel key must be a valid Meshtastic channel key (base64-encoded, 16 or 32 bytes).
Examples: • {1} 123 MyChannel ZGeGFyhk<...>3sUOUGyaHqrvU= single Or use {1} without parameters and I'll ask for the channel name and key.
data.comment: {0} - provided key text, {1} - add channel command

data.name: AddChannel_InvalidChannelName
data.value:
Invalid channel name format: '{0}'. The channel name must be a valid Meshtastic channel name (less than 12 bytes).
Examples: • {1} 123 MyChannel ZGeGFyhk<...>3sUOUGyaHqrvU= single • {1} 123 MyChannel ZGeGFyhk<...>3sUOUGyaHqrvU= multiple Or use {1} without parameters and I'll ask for the channel name and key.
data.comment: {0} - provided channel name, {1} - add channel command

data.name: AddChannel_NetworkNotFound_Md1
data.value:
Network ID {0} not found. Please make sure to provide a valid network ID.
*Available networks:* {1} Please reply with valid network ID or type {2} to cancel the registration.
data.comment: {0} - network id, {1} - list of networks (already formatted with escaping), {2} - stop command

data.name: AddChannel_SelectNetwork_Md1
data.value:
Please select a network by replying with its ID: {0} _If your city is not listed and you are ready to convert your device to a TMesh gateway, please contact the administrator - {1}_
Type {2} to cancel.
data.comment: {0} - list of networks (pre-formatted), {1} - admin contact (escaped), {2} - stop command

data.name: PromoteGateway_NeedId
data.value: Please send the Meshtastic device ID to promote to gateway. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).{0}

data.name: PromoteGateway_FirmwareWarning
data.value: ⚠️ This command requires custom TMesh firmware on your device. Flash it first at: {0}

data.name: PromoteGateway_FirmwareWarningNoUrl
data.value: ⚠️ This command requires custom TMesh firmware on your device.

data.name: PromoteGateway_InvalidIdFormat
data.value: Invalid device ID format: '{0}'. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).

data.name: PromoteGateway_NeedIdOrStop
data.value: Please send a Meshtastic device ID or {0} to cancel.

data.name: PromoteGateway_InvalidIdOrStop
data.value: Invalid device ID format. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #). Send {0} to cancel.

data.name: PromoteGateway_NotRegistered
data.value: Device {0} is not registered in this chat. Please add it first using {1}.

data.name: PromoteGateway_SessionLost
data.value: Session data lost. Please start over with {0}.

data.name: PromoteGateway_DeviceNotFound
data.value: Device not found. Please start over with {0}.

data.name: PromoteGateway_FirmwareConfirmPrompt_Md1
data.comment: {0} - device name (escaped), {1} - hex id, {2} - optional flasher line, {3} - stop command

data.name: PromoteGateway_FirmwareConfirmFlasherLine
data.value: You can flash it at: {0}

data.name: PromoteGateway_RepeatFirmwareConfirm_Md1
data.value:
Please flash the custom TMesh firmware on your device first.{0}
Reply "*yes*" once the firmware is installed, or {1} to cancel.

data.name: DemoteGateway_NeedId
data.value: Please send the Meshtastic device ID to demote from gateway. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).

data.name: DemoteGateway_InvalidIdFormat
data.value: Invalid device ID format: '{0}'. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).

data.name: DemoteGateway_NeedIdOrStop
data.value: Please send a Meshtastic device ID or {0} to cancel.

data.name: DemoteGateway_InvalidIdOrStop
data.value: Invalid device ID format. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #). Send {0} to cancel.

data.name: DemoteGateway_NotRegistered
data.value: Device {0} is not registered in this chat. You can only demote devices registered in this chat.

data.name: DemoteGateway_Done
data.value:
✅ Device {0} ({1}) has been demoted from gateway.
You can disconnect it from the MQTT server in your Meshtastic app settings.

data.name: DemoteGateway_WasNotGateway
data.value: Device {0} ({1}) was not registered as a gateway.

data.name: RegisterGroup_NameInvalidSpaces
data.value: Chat name can't contain spaces.

data.name: RegisterGroup_NameInvalidTooLong
data.value: Chat name is too long. Maximum length is {0} characters.

data.name: RegisterGroup_NameInvalidAt
data.value: Chat name can't start with '@' character.

data.name: RegisterGroup_NameInvalidPrefix
data.value: Invalid chat name.

data.name: RegisterGroup_NameInvalidSuffix
data.value: Please choose a different name.

data.name: ChatDevice_NeedArg
data.value:
Please provide a device ID or part of the approved/registered device name to start a chat.
Examples: • {0} !75bcd15 • {0} MyApprovedNode

data.name: ChatDevice_MultipleMatch
data.value: Multiple devices match the provided filter '{0}'. Please be more specific.

data.name: ChatDevice_NotValidIdNoDevices
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid device ID and there are no registered or approved devices in this chat to find device by name. The device ID can be decimal or hex (hex starts with ! or #).

data.name: ChatDevice_NotValidIdNoMatch
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid device ID and does not match any registered or approved device names.

data.name: ChatDevice_IsBotNode
data.value: You can't start a chat with {0} node. This node is used only for relaying messages between devices and Telegram and doesn't have a user interface to reply to messages. Please use {1} command with the ID of your device or a private channel registered with TMesh to start a chat.
data.comment: {0} - bot node name long, {1} - chat command

data.name: ChatDevice_UnknownDevice
data.value: Device {0} is not known to TMesh. The device needs to broadcast its Node info or send it directly to {1} node using "Exchange user information".
data.comment: {0} - hex id, {1} - bot node name long

data.name: ChatDevice_SessionStarted
data.value:
✅ Chat with {0} ({1}) is now active. You can start sending messages.
All messages you send will be forwarded only to this device. Use {2} command to end the session.
data.comment: {0} - device name, {1} - hex id, {2} - end chat command

data.name: ChatDevice_ChattingWithOther
data.value: {0} is chatting with someone else

data.name: ChatDevice_RequestSent
data.value: 📤 Chat request sent to {0} ({1}). Waiting for the device to reply with 6 digit numeric code to approve the chat...

data.name: ChatDevice_TooManyRequests
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of chat requests ({0}) sent. Please wait at least 1 hour before trying again to start a chat with any device. Chat request aborted.

data.name: ChatDevice_RequestText
data.value: Chat request from @{0} (Telegram). Reply with code {1} to accept.

data.name: ChatChannel_InvalidCommand
data.value:
Please provide a channel name and channel ID to start a chat. You or someone else should register channel first with {0} command to get the ID.
Examples: • {1} MyChannel:1 Where 'MyChannel' name is Meshtastic channel name and '1' is the channel ID you get from TMesh when registering the channel with {0} command. If channel is registered or approved in this chat you can start chat with {1} MyChannel, where Name is just filter by name (will match MyChannelX, amychannel)
data.comment: {0} - add channel command, {1} - chat channel command

data.name: ChatChannel_MultipleMatch
data.value: Multiple channels match the provided filter '{0}'. Please be more specific or provide channel ID to start chat.

data.name: ChatChannel_NotFound
data.value: There are no channels with ID {0} and name {1}. The channel needs to be registered first with {2} command to get ID.
data.comment: {0} - channel id, {1} - channel name part, {2} - add channel command

data.name: ChatChannel_SessionStarted
data.value:
✅ Chat with {0} is now active. You can start sending messages.
All messages you send will be forwarded only to this channel. Use {1} command to end the session.

data.name: ChatChannel_ChattingWithOther
data.value: {0} is chatting with someone else

data.name: ChatChannel_RequestSent
data.value: 📤 Chat request sent to {0}. Waiting for the channel to reply with 6 digit numeric code to approve the chat...

data.name: ChatChannel_TooManyRequests
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of chat requests ({0}) sent. Please wait at least 1 hour before trying again to start a chat with any device or channel. Chat request aborted.

data.name: ChatChannel_RequestText
data.value: Chat request from @{0} (Telegram). Reply with code {1} to accept.

data.name: StopChat_NoActiveSession
data.value: There is no active chat session to stop.

data.name: StopChat_Done
data.value: ✅ Chat session with {0} has been stopped

data.name: StopChat_MeshNotification
data.value: Chat session with Telegram chat has been stopped

data.name: StopChat_MeshOtherEndedNotification
data.value: Chat with {0} is ended

data.name: GatewaySetup_PromotedHeader_Md1
data.value: ✅ Device *{0}* ({1}) has been promoted to gateway.

data.name: GatewaySetup_MqttHeader_Md1
data.value: 📡 *MQTT Gateway Setup Instructions*

data.name: GatewaySetup_Step1Flasher_Md1
data.value: 1. If you haven't already, flash the custom TMesh firmware: {0}

data.name: GatewaySetup_Step2MqttIntro_Md1
data.value: 2. Open your Meshtastic app → Config → Network → MQTT and set the following:

data.name: GatewaySetup_MqttIntroNoStep_Md1
data.value: Open your Meshtastic app → Config → Network → MQTT and set the following:

data.name: GatewaySetup_ServerAddress_Md1
data.value: • *Server address:* `{0}`

data.name: GatewaySetup_Username_Md1
data.value: • *Username:* `{0}`

data.name: GatewaySetup_Password_Md1
data.value: • *Password:* `{0}`

data.name: GatewaySetup_RootTopic_Md1
data.value: • *Root topic:* `{0}`

data.name: GatewaySetup_EncryptionOn_Md1
data.value: • *Encryption enabled:* On ✅

data.name: GatewaySetup_JsonOff_Md1
data.value: • *JSON output enabled:* Off ❌

data.name: GatewaySetup_TlsOff_Md1
data.value: • *TLS enabled:* Off ❌

data.name: GatewaySetup_MapReportingOn_Md1
data.value: • *Map reporting:* On ✅

data.name: GatewaySetup_OtherSettings_Md1
data.value: Other settings:

data.name: GatewaySetup_DeviceRole_Md1
data.value: • Set Device Role to *Client* in Device settings. If you prefer *Client Mute*, than add {0} node to favorites, set device role to *Client* and rebroadcast mode to *KNOWN_ONLY*.

data.name: GatewaySetup_TelemetryEnable_Md1
data.value: • Enable Device telemetry in Meshtastic settings, this will help to monitor network quality.

data.name: GatewaySetup_TelemetryHops_Md1
data.value: • If you have enabled Device telemetry please set Number of Hops in LoRa settings to 7.

data.name: GatewaySetup_FirstSeenNotification_Md1
data.value: When the first packet will be received by the TMesh from your device, you will get a notification in this chat.
